name: Revival Boutique & Thrift
notes: Clean/organized; wide variety (books/toys/furniture/housewares/clothing); community-focused nonprofit; mixed pricing perception

name: 2nd STREET Pasadena
notes: Curated resale (designer/vintage/trendy); attracts younger clientele; strong brand presence; mixed selling experience reviews

name: The Huntington Collection
notes: Charity-affiliated; high-end furniture/designer items; limited hours (Mon–Fri 10am–3pm); big parking lot in back

name: Acts Thrift Store & Donation Center
notes: Small location; very affordable; rotating discount color tags; limited parking; strong bargain-hunter reputation

name: MEOWMEOWZ! Retro 80s Thrift Boutique
notes: Punk/goth/rock vintage + some new items; live music on weekends; quirky niche inventory; harder to discover via generic searches

name: Rose Bowl Flea - Designer Handbag Hidden Gem
notes: Vendor sells designer handbags very cheap; not searchable online as a distinct seller; appears only via in-person flea market discovery

name: Rose Bowl Flea - Secondhand Boots Hidden Gem
notes: Vendor sells amazing secondhand boots for cheap; no standalone digital footprint; discovered via friends at flea market

name: Silver Lake Flea - IG-only Hidden Gem
notes: Has Instagram but difficult to find through Google search; discovery mainly via social sharing/IG reposts
